# Contributing Guidelines

Thank you for your interest in contributing! We welcome contributions of all kinds from anyone.

## How to contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a new branch (`git checkout -b feature/my-feature`)
3. Make your changes
4. Commit your changes (`git commit -am 'Add some feature'`)
5. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/my-feature`)
6. Create a new Pull Request

## Reporting Bugs

Please use the provided Issue Templates to report bugs. Include as much detail as possible to help us reproduce the issue.

## Suggesting Enhancements

If you have an idea for a new feature, please submit an issue using the Feature Request template.
